name: git_backup_restore
description: Backs up or restores the agent workspace using Git. Supports committing current workspace state (backup) or reverting to a previous commit (restore). Useful for versioning agent work.

parameters.action: Git action to perform: create_backup, list_backups, restore, rollback_to_previous, or show_diff
parameters.commit_hash: Commit hash for restore or show_diff
parameters.limit: Maximum number of backups to list for list_backups (default: 10)
parameters.mode: Restore mode for restore action, e.g. revert or hard

returns: Status of the git operation and relevant output
